name: gmgn
description: GMGN — bilingual agentic delivery from idea to milestone closure / 从想法到关账的中英双语 agent 研发工作流。

interface.shortDescription: Bilingual agent workflow from idea to closure / 从想法到关账的双语 agent 工作流
interface.longDescription: Nine composable skills manage discovery, G-R-D-T documents, task execution, independent review, and milestone closure in English or Chinese. / 九件技能用中英文管理需求澄清、规格链、逐卡实现、独立评审和关账。
defaultPrompt: Use GMGN to turn my idea into an executable project.
Use GMGN to determine the correct next step.
用 GMGN 判断这个项目下一步该做什么。
用 GMGN 按任务卡实现并完成审查。
